REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (18 Ramsell St., S.F., Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for petitioner Christine Witherspoon. Sale is confirmed at $595,000.00. Additional bond in the amount of $80,000.00 is required. Order signed.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: F. Smith.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property And To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCE BY NANCY RASH, ATTY FOR PETITIONER, JOHNATHAN NEWMAN, ATTY. FOR L. KAHANA, FORMER TRUSTEE
MS. SELBY DISCHARGE 5/9/06. NOT CASH IN ESTATE FOR PISSIBLE TAXES OR TRAVEL. L. KAHANA HAD DIFFICULTY MAKING PAYMENT ON REAL PROPERTY. N. RASCH IS GOING TO REQUEST TO SELL REAL PROPERTY. THE REALATOR IS WILL TO ADVANCE $10,000.00 FOR MOVING EXPENSE FOR L. KAHANA. N. RASCH TO REIVSE ORDER REFLECTING THE $10,000.00 THE ADVANCE AND THE SELL OF REAL PROPERTY.
COMMISSIONER:DOROTHY MCMATH; CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON; RPTR.:CHRISTINA PAXTON

Petition For Order Bringing Revocable Trust Under Court Supervision, Revoking Powers Of The Trustee And Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-08-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alice Kahana, Conservatee; Barbara Selby, Counsel for the Conservatee; Christine Witherspoon, Petitioner; Nancy Rasch, Counsel for the Petitioner; 15+ family members.

The Court noted that the Petition was procedurally in order and granted the Petition to bring the trust under court supervision and appointed Ms. Witherspoon as Successor Trustee. An Order would be prepared by Ms. Rasch.

No bond was set.

Inventory must be filed two weeks before: September 20, 2006.
First Account must be filed two weeks before: August 14, 2007.

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy McMath; Reporter: Teanna Ward CSR#11918; Court Investigator: Jeanine Lim; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: Candace Lum.
